reviews.title: Quality downgrade from previous years
reviews.reviewText:
For the last several years I’ve purchased multiple evolution polos, I currently own over a dozen.

This year’s design has absolutely taken a turn for the worst as profit margin has clearly taken priority over garment quality. The fabric feels cheap, the button under the collar has been removed (which makes it look floppy and unstructured) which is a real bummer as this was my favorite part about the shirt. The fabric trim lining the collar placket and neckband has also been removed... which also adds to the sloppy overall look. 

If the quality/design was the same as last year, I would have ordered every color you make (as I did last year). I’m now on the hunt for a new polo, from a different brand to fill my closet. :(

reviews.title: Get back to the way it was
reviews.reviewText:
I have maybe 20 of these. They all have a couple of distinctive features: a darker strip on the inside of the collar and down the middle around the buttons (usually black) and small buttons holding down the lapels. 

These features help make this polo unique. 

With this latest iteration of the design, Lululemon got rid of both of those details. 

Now these polos, which used to look distinctive, just look like a commodity. 

And frankly, if I wanted to wear a commodity, I would have paid $15 for these at H&M. 

Please make your design more distinctive, not less. I’ll be returning this latest version and will wait for you to redesign them. Thanks.

reviews.title: Fits well but early and excessive pilling is a major limitation
reviews.reviewText: I own a number of different Lululemon products, including various shorts, pants, and short sleeve shirts purchased over time. Generally speaking, I've been quite satisfied with the look, fit, and durability of their products. That said, I own 3 iterations of the Evolution Polo which have unfortunately not lived up to the level of quality and durability I previously found with other products. Don't get me wrong, the athletic fit of the shirt is great and it was versatile enough that you could wear it casually, while golfing, or even at the office. The main issue with these polos is that all three of them have been prone to pilling early, even after just 5 wears or so. The most recent iteration of this shirt I purchased (shade stripe heathered dark royal heathered black) began pilling in multiple areas after only wearing it twice. I have stopped wearing my other two Evolution Polos due to the large degree of pilling all over each shirt. I follow the washing directions strictly and do not have this problem with my other Lululemon items. I have to say that while I was initially satisfied with these polos, their early and excessive pilling has left me pretty disappointed. Not what I have grown to expect from this brand in terms of quality and durability.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hey Gray6,
Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts today. We stand behind the quality of our gear and will be in touch shortly via email to follow up and help!
Chat soon.

reviews.title: Great Fit, Terrible Quality...Very Disappointed
reviews.reviewText:
To start, I"m a huge Lulu proponent and often recommend the brand to friends and colleagues. I own items ranging from the ABC pants to Surge shorts to Metal Vent tanks; and throughout my history of ownership, I have not had any serious issues with the quality of the items.

In my search for a form fitting, multi functional polo, my first instinct was Lulu...where I found the Evolution polo. I tried on the large and instantly purchased two (gray and navy). At $88, my expectations were that it would fit perfectly and last for years...similar to other Lulu products I own.

My first expectation was met. The fit of the Evolution polo is perfect. 

However, the Evolution polo missed my second expectation for quality by a mile. Purchased at the start of the summer in May, I wear each polo once a week (at most)...so less than 20 wears. I also wash and dry these polos with the same care as my other Lulu items. Unfortunately, similar to many other reviews, the Evolution polo did not hold up as there's significant "pilling" occurring in random patches. 

Ultimately, my initial love with the Evolution polo ended with a lot of disappointment. The $88 price tag warrants a higher quality, significantly longer lasting polo.

reviews.title: BEWARE OF THE NEW "BLACK" COLOUR
reviews.reviewText:
I have several evolution polos and they are great; however, I just purchased the new "black" one and was HIGHLY disappointed. I returned it to my local store after one wear and one wash.

First of all, the website says the polo is black, and even though the photo looks more like a charcoal grey, I ordered it. When it arrived it was indeed charcoal grey, NOT black.

The second issue is that the polo is advertised as being "Silverescent® technology, powered by X-STATIC®" and "we added LYCRA® fibre for stretch and shape retention" ...which my other Evolution Polos definitely are; but alas, this new "black" one is NOT. Instead, it feels like it is 100% cotton, like any old run-of-the-mill t-shirt.

And since it's all (or mostly) cotton, what do you think happened when I washed it. Yup!

Nice false advertising, Lululemon. Even the guy behind the counter in my local store was rolling his eyes at this.

reviews.title: Great polo, doesnt last
reviews.reviewText:
I have purchased about a dozen of these over the past two years. The first generation were my favorite polo shirts - ever. 

The new version has the same great fit, and an excellent material. Unfortunately, the collar is oddly short/small for nearly all settings, and simply doesn't last beyond one to two washes (I launder professionally following instructions) before it begins piling. 

I always recommend LuLu, but this new version of the Evolution - well, the quality is embarrassing.

reviews.title: great style and fit but disappointing quality
reviews.reviewText:
My husband loves this polo, so much so that we bought another one soon after we bought the first. We probably would've bought more had there been more colors at that time.

The style is lovely, and the fabric is nice and lightweight. HOWEVER, we are very disappointed with the quality. I've noticed pilling around the collar after having the shirt for only a few months. We take very good care of our lululemon clothes and have been devoted to this brand for years. We always wash lululemon clothes in cold, cold water in a garment bag on delicate cycle without any fabric softener and air dry only. Needless to say, I am upset that such an expensive shirt could have such abysmal durability.

reviews.title: Evolution Polo
reviews.reviewText:
One of my favorite shirts to wear for work. Love the style, the color and how great they look with a pair of jeans or Khakis. However, after owning this shirt for about a month, and a half dozen washes later, it too, is starting to "pill." Mind you, I wash this shirt inside out, and only dry for about 10 min and then it's taken out to hang dry. I use Tide detergent on all my clothes, and for whatever reason, the Evolution shirt is the only shirt that has started to pill.

Very disappointed for a $88.00 US shirt. Quality is sub par with my families previous Lululemon purchases. My Ralph Lauren $60 polos that are 3 years old have held up better.

To make matters worse, went order another shirt, 3 days ago. Was told it was out of stock and website had not yet been updated. Still not updated. Shirt and size are showing in stock one min, then out of stock the next min. Very frustrating. Very disappointing.

reviews.title: High quality?
reviews.reviewText: I love lululemon and wear many of their articles of clothing. I love this polo and bought my first one late last season (don't wear short sleeves much in the winter). I love the feel, the look, the fit, etc. I've been looking to buy another—however, I am hesitating on this one because I'm starting to notice fraying in several places, including on the top of the collar where it's pretty visible. I don't think it's due to poor use because I always only wear this shirt on "to + from" occasions (no sports or gym use) and I always wash delicate and hang dry. Instead, I think it may be due to a fabric / material that is kind of fragile and susceptible to wearing more quickly over time. Like I said, I love lululemon but I would expect such an expensive and nice shirt to hold its own for a longer period of use.

reviews.title: Really nice polo. XL fit not as tapered as expected
reviews.reviewText:
Material A+
Color and quality A
Fit B

Lululemon makes up the majority of my polos. Super comfortable material, quality and fit. As for fit I usually get XL as it comfortably fits my chest and shoulders and is tapered in an athletic cut for the waist. This one, however, is less tapered and the fit is a bit loose in the midsection and waist area compared to other Lululemon polos.

reviews.title: Lulu Summer Shirts
reviews.reviewText: I've now purchased 4 LLL summer weight shirts in different styles. A V-neck crew, button down collar, collared-no buttons, and collar buttons. Have gray, black, navy and green. All have worn beautifully, require only cold wash, hang dry, and are the most comfortable shirts I've ever worn. I tend to wear U/A wicking compression tees beneath all of my shirts, and this enhances the comfort of the LLL shirts as they are protected from perspiration, and maintain their excellent, form fitting appearance. If you don't wear undershirts, the LLL material will keep you comfortable. I like the placement of the LLL logo at the bottom of the shirt tail instead of the upper middle back. Details, craftsmanship, styling and comfort second to none. Pricing on the high side, but you get what you pay for in quality longevity.

reviews.title: A bit snug
reviews.reviewText: I generally wear size large in lululemon shirts. I like my shirts a bit roomy so I can move without restriction. This shirt is a bit more form sitting than normal. I wish I has purchased it in an xl. Otherwise it is a nice shirt.

reviews.title: Great shirt but creased
reviews.reviewText: My shirt came and the color is awesome (Royal Ruby). I’m glad Lulu gave customers some options on color versus the typical earth tones. However, the shirt came strangely creased/wrinkled in the package beyond what I have seen before, as I have 3 other Evolution Polo’s in my wardrobe. I washed it, dried it on low for 10 min., hung it to dry damp and the creases were still there? I then tried my clothes steamer to no avail. Unfortunately I returned the shirt. I think Lulu will correct this and these shirts are tremendous which is why I gave it 4 stars.

reviews.title: Can Be Great, But Frequently Changing and Not for the Better
reviews.reviewText:
I've purchased upwards of 8 or 9 of these polos. My first few were great - fit was perfect, a decent range of color choices, and a wide spread collar. 

Then they turned to only muted colors of greys and blues. Then they got rid of the wide spread collar. Then they changed some of the fabrics (remember that black polo debacle - it was lower quality than the Gap). 

No idea why they make these changes because with each new itteration, Lululemon makes the polo worse, more generic, and less attractive. And please, add new colors and patterns. As my title suggests, this polo can be great and superior to most other polos from other companies - but - Lululemon cannot get out of its own way. Would give it a 3.5 if I could rather than a 4..

comments.text: I post this because I believe its important we speak out when we see something that doesn’t accurately reflect what we believe to be the truth. I like many other men have striven to find a polo that fits perfectly, is of great quality and is fashion forward, and this polo checks all boxes. As such I must reach out and say that I disagree with the claim above ten fold, the changes described above make this polo more modern, functional and versatile than ever before and I just want to encourage Lulu to continue on this trend as they continue to improve the look, quality and functionality of their products. Great work guys, keep it up!

The fit is definitely trimmer than the Metal Vent. Arms are slightly snugger as well. Fits my waist perfectly but is a tad tight in the chest, but until LULU does made to measure (ha), this will be my go-to.

reviews.title: Fantastic Golf Shirt
reviews.reviewText:
This is just the 2nd Lulu item I’ve ever owned and I couldn’t be more happy with this polo purchase. 

I’m 6’3 at 175 and I’ll admit I’m very picky about the fit of my polos ... and too many top brands are inconsistent with their sizing. I got a M and the stitching sits right at my shoulders, the sleeve lengths are ideal, the shirt has a bit of slim fit but not too slim, and the length of the shirt is perfect when it’s untucked. 

It’s pricey and I’ll wait a bit before buying a 2nd, but I have no regrets.

reviews.title: Work Appropriate Polo Finally
reviews.reviewText: This is the first short sleeve Lulu polo I've tried that I actually like and can wear to work. The material is sufficiently breathable and stretchy, with anti-stink, which are all requirements for me in a shirt like this. We'll see how it holds up. The cut is also mostly good, although maybe a little too fitted. The collar could also stand to be a bit shorter in the front, as it is almost hitting my jaw at times with the top 2 buttons undone. Having a logo near the collar is a total deal-breaker for a shirt like this so I like that the logo was moved down so that it's hidden when the shirt is tucked. Better would be not to use a contrasting reflective logo, or no logo at all. Any contrasting elements harm the ability of this shirt to work as well for work. More solid colours please.

reviews.title: Great Shirt
reviews.reviewText: Great polo to do everything in, especially if it's hot and humid outside. Plus the collar stays in place so you don't have to worry about it flipping out.

reviews.title: BEST
reviews.reviewText: BEST POLO FOR HOT AND HUMIDITY SUMMER. NO STINK!

comments.text: Like many, to date, I've considered the evolution polo to be the best ever. This season it appears the collar has changed. No longer an extra wide cut. I was so disappointed with the new cut that I didn't purchase. Will probably cave eventually. Just think it looks like any other polo shirt now.

reviews.title: Favorite Golf Shirt
reviews.reviewText: This is my favorite polo in my closet. Bought it last summer and it's perfect for the golf course. Fits great but is my only one so far so I'm on the hunt for more. Once some more colors become available..........

reviews.title: Great Polos!
reviews.reviewText: I love these Evolution polo's. They fit so perfect and look very nice. I love that the collar buttons up. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Best Polo by Lulu
reviews.reviewText: I have this polo in 8 different colors. Obsessed? Definitely. If you live in a humid and hot city like Houston, then you should definitely invest in these. I seriously can't wear anything else during the summer because these polos are THAT comfortable. It will keep you dry and cool throughout the day and the material retains its quality after many washes.

comments.text:
I have 8 of these and I just ordered another one....but to my dismay...they changed the fabric...it used to be 80% polyester, 10% tercel, 5% static and 5% elastene. Now it is 58% cotton with some other fabrics....it does not wash well,

One of the hidden beauty's of this shirt was that you did not have to iron it.

Lululemon - stop changing things, please. Add more colors - do not change the products.
What was once 5+ stars is now a 1 star.

reviews.title: My Favorite Polo
reviews.reviewText: I love your Evolution Polos. I have every one you make but WHY when you come out with new colors they are always gray or blue?? Two shades of light blue and then a light gray, a dark gray, and then gray with 3 different stripes? Why cant you make a black, white, navy or red? You can only wear so much gray and blue. Please make it in other colors.

reviews.title: Great fit and feel
reviews.reviewText: My husband got this one for a recent trip. Very nice fit and style. Liked the material feel too. A nice thickness and stretch to it. We just ordered another one however I just read some concerns about the long term use and material. Fingers crossed it won't happen to our two recent purchases at this price point. Would love to see it in a navy or black too if the quality doesn't disappoint after several washes.

reviews.title: Fiance has four of these
reviews.reviewText: This polo is super flattering on my fiance. He loves to wear them on casual fridays. It's got a nice athletic cut and hangs from the shoulders very nicely. I'm always on the lookout for future bday and holiday presents.

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.reviewText: Great fit, great style and detailing, and get colours! Super-comfortable... I now own three.

reviews.title: Excellent Polo
reviews.reviewText: This polo is perfect for tennis and wearing casually. Feels more robust than the metal vent tech polos. Please add a white color.

reviews.title: Best polo EVER
reviews.reviewText: Love it for work, golf, social. Amazing fit. BUT BRING IT BACK!!

reviews.title: make more of these in more colors
reviews.reviewText:
I must own about 10 of these, mostly in different colors, though a couple of the heathered-black, which is more of a dark grey.

These are probably my favorite Lulu polos, because they are so comfortable, yet fit into the dress-casual category.

I've been eagerly waiting for more colors to show up on the site, and suddenly there's a few other styles of polos available....but, not as nice as the Evos.....there's now a Chip Shot Polo, that looks quite similar to the Evos from the front, but has mess panels on the back, which mean they don't fall in the dress-casual, work-attire category.

reviews.title: best polos I own
reviews.reviewText:
These polos fit excellent. Snug around the biceps and shoulders and leave a little room in the belly. The collars are great as a hidden button keeps them in place. I use these for going out with jeans or at the golf course.

Please make more colors available! Gator green, etc... There is always only 2-3 to choose from.

reviews.title: Great shirt so far!
reviews.reviewText: I bought this as a gift for my boyfriend, a few months ago, who is a typical guy and thinks spending this much money on clothes is ridiculous. In excess it can be but I got him this shirt and shorts as a gift and he loves this shirt. It's business casual to wear to work but not so casual like the metal vent polo's with the body mapping. He keeps asking me if lulu still makes these polos. Well, I hope you never stop making them. He loves his polo and the best part is he just hangs it and doesn't need to iron it, the shirt doesn't wrinkle. Hassle free clothes is a plus with men. The anti-stink doesn't hurt either. haha More colors and never stop making, this it is a staple to-and-from shirt in the men's section!

reviews.title: Best Fitted Polo
reviews.reviewText: These polo's are amazing in texture and design. I've been extremely happy with the Bold Narrow Stripe and Heathered Black (which looks more charcoal than black). I'm a fitness enthusiast and this polo really helps accent every cut. Your hard work at the gym reflects. More than that, the fabric is lightweight and breathable. I'm 5'8 with an athletic build and the medium fits really nice. I may consider additional colors later, but these two will do just fine.

reviews.title: Great Polo
reviews.reviewText: excellent fit, not too tight or too loose. Can be worn tucked in but better untucked. The only issue is there are not more colors available and skip the silly striped versions. how about good ol' navy?

reviews.title: The only thing i don't like is they sell out quick
reviews.reviewText: The collar fits amazing, and the feel of the cloth is that of t-shirt that you've owned for years. They do run a little small but thats ok. We need more colors!!

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.reviewText: I just bought this shirt, and it's super comfortable and has a very smart cut.

reviews.title: The best polo shirt that I own
reviews.reviewText:
This is the best polo shirt that I own, and one of the better shirts (T-shirt, polo, or dress) that I have.

The material is light, and very comfortable. I like how buttons were added under the collar. I've used this polo while working out, and while going out with friends for drinks. I'd consider the cut of the shirt to be slim- slim in the shoulders and arms, but having some room in the stomach area. For me (6ft 180 lbs size large) this is the best fitting polo shirt that I think I've ever bought.

At the time of purchase, there were three colors available (purple with a grey patch, light grey, and "black", which is actually a dark grey. I can see that there are more colors available online now, but I'd still like to see more. It seems that with many styles, only shades of grey are available! I agree that grey is a staple color- but so is navy blue, green, and real black!

reviews.title: you should have this in your closet
reviews.reviewText: I have no complaints with this shirt at all. The way it feels on the torso and back are my major take away from this shirt. It is like a lighter version of the union polo. They just feel so great and looks good, of course.

reviews.title: Absolutely love the look and function of this polo
reviews.reviewText: The fit is very athletic and I always get a lot of compliments about how good my chest and arms look when I wear it. Definitely for the lean muscular type ie: swimmer, runner/weight lifter. The collar design is great as well, very original and gives a sporty edge to the look. Its nice to have a polo that is versatle like this since it can be dressed up but also get sweaty without stinking.

reviews.title: Another great polo!!
reviews.reviewText:
Lululemon hits another home run with men's polos! Love love love the hidden buttons to keep the collar down. Right there the polo earns a 4/5 in my opinion, lol!

The polo is great in other ways, like it is stylish and looks work appropriate/dinner out appropriate, while also being practical for a game of golf. Fabric feels good and holds up well with washes. Fit is TTS. No complaints!

reviews.title: This One is Nice
reviews.reviewText: This one is fantastic for everything. I have 5 polos and the anti stink ones rock. I had to learn the hard way because three of the five were below average...as in way below. They were the regular ones with paper type collars. I generally love this company and this shirt is one that you cannot go wrong with.

reviews.title: love all the lulu polo's
reviews.reviewText: I bought all three of these and love them all. these polos fit great, athletic fit like I prefer and very soft. I own every polo lulu makes and these could be my new favorite. Looking forward to more polos Lulu brings out. Keep them coming!
